changeSet.author: openclinica
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_event_audit_table ON public.audit_log_event(audit_table);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_event_user_id ON public.audit_log_event(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_event_entity_id ON public.audit_log_event(entity_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_event_audit_log_event_type_id ON public.audit_log_event(audit_log_event_type_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_event_event_crf_id ON public.audit_log_event(event_crf_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_evt_study_event_id ON public.audit_log_event(study_event_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_audit_log_evntcrf_versn_id ON public.audit_log_event(event_crf_version_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_null_value_type_code ON public.null_value_type(code);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_oc_oid ON public.rule(oc_oid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_rule_expression_id ON public.rule(rule_expression_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_status_id ON public.rule(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_acn_rulesetrule_id ON public.rule_action(rule_set_rule_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_action_action_type ON public.rule_action(action_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_action_status_id ON public.rule_action(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_expression_status_id ON public.rule_expression(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_rule_expression_id ON public.rule_set(rule_expression_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_study_event_definition_id ON public.rule_set(study_event_definition_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_crf_id ON public.rule_set(crf_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_crf_version_id ON public.rule_set(crf_version_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_study_id ON public.rule_set(study_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_status_id ON public.rule_set(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_audit_rule_set_id ON public.rule_set_audit(rule_set_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_audit_status_id ON public.rule_set_audit(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_rule_rule_set_id ON public.rule_set_rule(rule_set_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_rule_rule_id ON public.rule_set_rule(rule_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_rule_status_id ON public.rule_set_rule(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_rule_audit_rule_set_rule_id ON public.rule_set_rule_audit(rule_set_rule_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_rule_set_rule_audit_status_id ON public.rule_set_rule_audit(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_event_crf_map_event_crf_id ON public.dn_event_crf_map(event_crf_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_event_crf_map_discrepancy_note_id ON public.dn_event_crf_map(discrepancy_note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_item_data_map_item_data_id ON public.dn_item_data_map(item_data_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_item_data_map_discrepancy_note_id ON public.dn_item_data_map(discrepancy_note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_study_event_map_study_event_id ON public.dn_study_event_map(study_event_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_study_evnt_mapdscrpnoteid ON public.dn_study_event_map(discrepancy_note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_study_subject_map_study_subject_id ON public.dn_study_subject_map(study_subject_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_study_subject_map_discrepancy_note_id ON public.dn_study_subject_map(discrepancy_note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_discrepancy_note_discrepancy_note_type_id ON public.discrepancy_note(discrepancy_note_type_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_discrepancy_note_resolution_status_id ON public.discrepancy_note(resolution_status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_discrepancy_note_owner_id ON public.discrepancy_note(owner_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_discrepancy_note_parent_dn_id ON public.discrepancy_note(parent_dn_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_discrepancy_note_entity_type ON public.discrepancy_note(entity_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_discrepancy_note_study_id ON public.discrepancy_note(study_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_subject_map_subject_id ON public.dn_subject_map(subject_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dn_subject_map_discrepancy_note_id ON public.dn_subject_map(discrepancy_note_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_crf_version_map_dataset_id ON public.dataset_crf_version_map(dataset_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_crf_version_map_event_definition_crf_id ON public.dataset_crf_version_map(event_definition_crf_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_study_group_class_map_dataset_id ON public.dataset_study_group_class_map(dataset_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_study_group_class_map_study_group_class_id ON public.dataset_study_group_class_map(study_group_class_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_status_id ON public.dataset(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_filter_map_dataset_id ON public.dataset_filter_map(dataset_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_filter_map_filter_id ON public.dataset_filter_map(filter_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dataset_filter_map_ordinal ON public.dataset_filter_map(ordinal);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dc_primitive_dynamic_value_item_id ON public.dc_primitive(dynamic_value_item_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dc_section_event_section_id ON public.dc_section_event(section_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dc_substitution_event_item_id ON public.dc_substitution_event(item_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dc_computed_event_dc_event_id ON public.dc_computed_event(dc_event_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dc_computed_event_item_target_id ON public.dc_computed_event(item_target_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_dc_summary_item_map_item_id ON public.dc_summary_item_map(item_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_decision_condition_crf_version_id ON public.decision_condition(crf_version_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_decision_condition_status_id ON public.decision_condition(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_completion_status_status_id ON public.completion_status(status_id);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_group_metadata_item_id ON public.item_group_metadata(item_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_group_crf_id ON public.item_group(crf_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_group_status_id ON public.item_group(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_data_item_id ON public.item_data(item_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_data_event_crf_id ON public.item_data(event_crf_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_data_status_id ON public.item_data(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_data_ordinal ON public.item_data(ordinal);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_response_set_version_id ON public.response_set(version_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_form_metadata_parent_id ON public.item_form_metadata(parent_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_frm_mda_dcsn_cndn_id ON public.item_form_metadata(decision_condition_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_form_metadata_ordinal ON public.item_form_metadata(ordinal);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_section_status_id ON public.section(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_definition_status_id ON public.study_event_definition(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_definition_update_id ON public.study_event_definition(update_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_definition_oc_oid ON public.study_event_definition(oc_oid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_sample_ordinal ON public.study_event(sample_ordinal);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_date_start ON public.study_event(date_start);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_date_end ON public.study_event(date_end);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_status_id ON public.study_event(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_event_subject_event_status_id ON public.study_event(subject_event_status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_group_class_study_id ON public.study_group_class(study_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_group_class_status_id ON public.study_group_class(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_subject_group_map_study_group_class_id ON public.subject_group_map(study_group_class_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_subject_group_map_status_id ON public.subject_group_map(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_subject_label ON public.study_subject(label);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_subject_status_id ON public.study_subject(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_subject_oc_oid ON public.study_subject(oc_oid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_subject_date_of_birth ON public.subject(date_of_birth);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_subject_gender ON public.subject(gender);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_subject_unique_identifier ON public.subject(unique_identifier);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_subject_date_created ON public.subject(date_created);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_crf_date_interviewed ON public.event_crf(date_interviewed);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_crf_interviewer_name ON public.event_crf(interviewer_name);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_crf_study_subject_id ON public.event_crf(study_subject_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_units ON public.item(units);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_item_data_type_id ON public.item(item_data_type_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_item_reference_type_id ON public.item(item_reference_type_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_item_oc_oid ON public.item(oc_oid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_status_id ON public.crf(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_name ON public.crf(name);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_owner_id ON public.crf(owner_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_oc_oid ON public.crf(oc_oid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_definition_crf_study_id ON public.event_definition_crf(study_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_definition_crf_crf_id ON public.event_definition_crf(crf_id);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_definition_crf_ordinal ON public.event_definition_crf(ordinal);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_event_definition_crf_electronic_signature ON public.event_definition_crf(electronic_signature);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_version_name ON public.crf_version(name);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_version_status_id ON public.crf_version(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_crf_version_oc_oid ON public.crf_version(oc_oid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_pmtr_value_study_id ON public.study_parameter_value(study_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_parent_study_id ON public.study(parent_study_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_unique_identifier ON public.study(unique_identifier);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_name ON public.study(name);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_owner_id ON public.study(owner_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_type_id ON public.study(type_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_status_id ON public.study(status_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i_study_oc_oid ON public.study(oc_oid);
